title: Import Transactions
description: Upload transaction files from your financial institutions

qif.name: QIF (Quicken Interchange Format)
qif.description: Standard format used by Quicken and many financial institutions

ofx.name: OFX/QFX (Open Financial Exchange)
ofx.description: XML-based format used by banks and credit card companies

csv.name: CSV (Comma-Separated Values)
csv.description: Generic spreadsheet format with transaction data

json.name: JSON (Skrooge export)
json.description: High-fidelity Skrooge export with accounts, transfers and split transactions

howTo.title: How to Get Your Transaction Files
howTo.intro: Most banks and financial institutions allow you to download transaction history in one of the supported formats:
steps: Log in to your online banking or financial institution website
Navigate to your account statements or transaction history
Select QIF, OFX/QFX, CSV, or Skrooge JSON as the export format
Download the file and upload it below

privacy: Your financial data is encrypted and stored securely. Uploaded files are temporarily stored for processing and automatically deleted after 24 hours.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.description: Select a QIF, OFX/QFX, CSV, or Skrooge JSON file to import

account.title: Select Account
account.description: Choose the account for these transactions

review.title: Review Transactions
review.description: Review, categorise and edit transactions before importing

confirm.title: Confirm Import
confirm.description: Review the import summary and confirm

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel import?
cancelConfirm.description: You have an import in progress. Leaving now will cancel it and any changes you made during review will be lost.

accountSelection.description: Choose the account for these transactions, or leave blank to let the wizard create one automatically.
accountSelection.matchedSuffix: has been pre-selected below. You can change it if needed.
accountSelection.detectedSuffix: Select an existing account below, or leave blank and a new account named “{{name}}” will be created automatically.
accountSelection.noneFound: No account information was found in the file. Select an existing account below, or leave blank and a new account named “{{name}}” will be created automatically.
accountSelection.parsing: Parsing file and detecting account details… please wait
accountSelection.uploadFailedDesc: Could not start the import. Please check your connection and try again.
accountSelection.parsingFailedDesc: The file could not be parsed. It may be corrupted, in an unsupported format, or missing required tags.
accountSelection.label: Account

upload.validating: Please wait while we validate your file
upload.successDesc: Your file has been uploaded and validated
upload.fileEmpty: The selected file is empty (0 bytes). Please select a valid file.

review.loadingDescription: AI is categorizing your transactions. This may take a few minutes with local models.
review.autoAssignedDescription: Categories were assigned based on your transaction history. You can adjust any assignment below.
review.adjustAny: You can adjust any assignment below.
review.categorizationHint: {{count}} transaction(s) still need a category assignment.

mappings.title: Category Assignments ({{count}} unique categories)
mappings.help: Category mappings are applied automatically when you confirm the import. Unmapped categories will be left unassigned on the imported transactions.

categoryAssignments.title: Category Assignments ({{count}} unique categories)
categoryAssignments.footer: Category mappings are applied automatically when you confirm the import. Unmapped categories will be left unassigned on the imported transactions.

table.noMatches: No transactions match the selected filter.
table.noResults: No transactions match the selected filter.

progress.skipped: {{count}} transactions were skipped (duplicates or validation errors)

validation.dateFuture: Transaction date cannot be in the future
